meaning: n.(英国殖民统治时期的)印度籍海军军士,印度籍监工
examples: The court earlier heard PC Tindal had handed PC Stewart her police issue handcuffs after the officer had already cuffed Mrs Pattie to the window using his own set.
And Keith Stewart QC, for PC Tindal, said the female officer had no idea an assault was taking place on Mrs Pattie so could not have been part of it.
